financial.subtitle: Record your income and expenses for this month.

knowledge.subtitle: A short guide to what each calculator does and when to use it.

fixedDeposit.explanation: A fixed deposit locks a lump sum with a bank for a set term in exchange for a guaranteed interest rate. Interest accrues only on the original principal (simple interest), not on interest already earned.
fixedDeposit.whenToUse: Comparing short-to-medium term savings that pay simple interest, such as most bank term deposits.

compoundInterest.explanation: Compound interest grows your money on both the principal and the interest already earned, and can include regular monthly contributions on top of an initial investment.
compoundInterest.whenToUse: Long-term investments like stock index funds, retirement accounts, or any plan with regular contributions.

profitMargin.explanation: Net profit margin shows how much of every unit of revenue a business keeps as profit after all expenses, taxes, and costs are paid.
profitMargin.formula: Net Profit Margin (%) = (Net Profit ÷ Gross Revenue) × 100
profitMargin.whenToUse: Comparing a business's profitability over time, or against competitors, regardless of size.

npv.explanation: Net Present Value discounts a series of future cash flows back to today's value using a chosen discount rate, then subtracts the initial investment.
npv.whenToUse: Deciding whether a project or investment is worth pursuing — a positive NPV means it's expected to add value.

opportunityCost.explanation: Opportunity cost compares the return of the option you chose against the return you gave up by not choosing the alternative.
opportunityCost.formula: Opportunity Cost = FV(foregone option) − FV(chosen option)
opportunityCost.whenToUse: Choosing between two investments or uses of the same money, to see exactly what you'd be giving up.

admin.notAuthorized: You don't have access to this page.
admin.maintenanceModeDesc: When enabled, everyone except you sees a maintenance notice instead of the app. Use this while making changes or fixing something.

maintenance.title: Finma is under maintenance
maintenance.body: We're making some updates and will be back shortly. Thanks for your patience.
